script_text: Phonics is knowing the sounds letters make.
When you know phonics, you can read new words all by yourself.
Let us grow your phonics power.
B buzzes. M hums. T taps.
Some letters team up to make one sound.
SH in ship. CH in chip. TH in thumb.
When you see a new word, sound out each letter or letter team.
Now you are ready to use phonics power!
